title: Traditional British Broccoli and Cream Scones
description: A classic British recipe combining the flaky texture of scones with the nutritious goodness of broccoli and a rich, creamy finish.
instructions: 1. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
3. In a large skillet, melt the butter over medium heat.
4. Add broccoli to the skillet and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
5. In a separate bowl, whisk together milk and clotted cream.
6. Add the wet ingredients to the cooked broccoli and stir to combine.
7. Add the cubed scones to the skillet and toss until well coated.
8. Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 15-20 minutes.
9. Serve warm, topped with additional clotted cream if desired.
